IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_FHI_phn_phones')  IS NOT NULL 
DROP TABLE [ODS].[LP_FHI_phn_phones]

GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [ODS].[LP_FHI_phn_phones]
(
	[Id] [bigint] NULL,
	[Phone] [nvarchar](64) NULL,
	[Descr] [nvarchar](255) NULL,
	[Active] INT NULL,
	[SortOrder] [INT] NULL,
	[srs_id] [nvarchar](255) NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)

GO
